name: @wui-js/plugins
author: Sergio E. Belmar V. <wuijs.project@gmail.com>
description: WUI/JS Plugins Lib - WUI/JS Plugins Lib is an open-source JavaScript/CSS library that provides a collection of plugins for WUI/JS Main Lib classes.

scripts.prepack: rm README.md && cp NPM.md README.md && cp -r src/wui-js/plugins/. .
scripts.postpack: rm -f README.md && ln -s docs/README-en.md README.md && ls src/wui-js/plugins/ | grep -vE '^LICENSE$' | xargs rm -rf
